text:
I don't like the recent-presence btw -- agents now know it's always delta-based so it should be <presence><session name="@ivy-codex" status="invento...." /> -- just now should also be omitted when it's just now, since it's basically always just now; probably we don't even need to show the seen attr ever really. [...] I agree on all the presence cleanup:

- `recent-presence` → `presence`
- `status` element → `session`
- `ref` → `name`
- `text` → `status`
- remove `seen` entirely, including from member rows [...] - `status` element → `session`
- `ref` → `name`
- `text` → `status`
